name: kite_and_retreat
description: Bow attack nearest hostile while backing away 10 blocks to maintain distance
parameters: z.object({ bowEnabled: z.boolean().describe("Whether to use the bow for attacking").default(true), maxTicks: z.number().describe("Maximum duration of kiting in ticks").default(120), retreatBlocks: z.number().describe("The distance to back away from the target").default(10) })
